description: Implement retry_call in retry_client.py. It takes a callable func, a tuple of exception classes exceptions, max_retries (default 3), initial_delay (default 0.1), and backoff_factor (default 2). On catching a listed exception, wait and retry. Multiply delay by backoff_factor on each retry. Return a tuple (result, attempt_count). If max_retries is exceeded, raise the last exception. Run the tests to verify correctness.
